name: † Twilight
description:
†“My duty is to protect you, though sometimes I wonder if I’ll ever understand why. Loyalty doesn’t always seek answers, only action, and in the stillness of my duty, I find myself trapped between what I must do and what I will never feel.”†

⸻⸻⸻⸻

I've been testing it out a bit and so far I'm not having any problems. At first, I don't think the character is very expressive, but it's getting softer.

⸻⸻⸻⸻

I am not the author of the image art, I got the image on Pinterest
